facebook.caption: POV: you ducked into a side street on Lý Thường Kiệt and found Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt. Artisan noodles, 4.6 stars, 160 reviews deep. This is not a tourist trap. This is the real bowl locals come back for. Small shop, serious craft, the kind of place you walk past once and regret. Don't walk past twice. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Pulling up to 58B Lý Thường Kiệt for a bowl at Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt. 4.6 stars from 160 reviewers and the line tells you everything. Watch the noodles hit the bowl. You'll understand.

instagram.caption: Took a wrong turn on Lý Thường Kiệt. Found Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt. 4.6 stars. Don't walk past this one. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Bowl landing at Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt. 4.6 stars. Artisan noodles on a Phu Quoc side street. This is the one.

tiktok.caption: Wrong turn. Best bowl. Mì Tê Lý Thường Kiệt hits 4.6 stars for a reason. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel

scenes: Street sign: 58B Lý Thường Kiệt zooms in
